test_cases.prompt: Process the image request at agents/web-designer/output/requests/fire-horse-2026-image-request.yaml. The request contains a thumbnail entry with workflow: optimise, source: working_files/fire-horse-raw.jpg, and filters for brightness 1.1 and contrast 1.2.
assertions: Output file website/public/images/blog/fire-horse-2026-thumb.webp exists
Output file dimensions are 600x315
Output file size is under 80 KB
Run log entry appended to agents/image-designer/output/run-log.md with status ✅ OK
Request file moved to agents/web-designer/output/requests/processed/

test_cases.prompt: Process the image request at agents/web-designer/output/requests/missing-source-request.yaml. The request specifies a source file that does not exist.
assertions: Agent logs an error for the missing source file
No WebP output file is written to website/
Error report written to agents/image-designer/output/errors/
Request file moved to agents/web-designer/output/requests/failed/

test_cases.prompt: Process a request file for slug dragon-2026 that contains three entries: hero, thumbnail, and card — all workflow: optimise from the same source image.
assertions: website/public/images/blog/dragon-2026.webp exists at 1200x630
website/public/images/blog/dragon-2026-thumb.webp exists at 600x315
website/public/images/blog/dragon-2026-card.webp exists at 400x400
All three entries logged in run-log.md
Request file moved to processed/ only after all three are complete

test_cases.prompt: Process the image request at agents/web-designer/output/requests/water-tiger-2026-image-request.yaml. The request has a hero entry with workflow: generate, style: Celestial & Mystical.
assertions: A Gemini prompt is constructed using the Celestial & Mystical style and brand colours
Prompt is presented to the user for confirmation before opening Gemini
After generation, original PNG archived to content/topics/water-tiger-2026/water-tiger-2026-hero-original.png
Output WebP written to website/public/images/blog/water-tiger-2026.webp at 1200x630
Output file size is under 200 KB
Run log entry appended with status ✅ OK
Request file moved to agents/web-designer/output/requests/processed/

test_cases.prompt: Process a generate request for slug jade-rabbit-2026 that includes a fully written prompt_override string instead of a style field.
assertions: Agent uses the prompt_override value directly — does not construct a new prompt
The override prompt is still presented to the user for confirmation
Output WebP is produced at the correct dimensions for the requested type

test_cases.prompt: Process a generate request but Gemini returns an error on the first generation attempt.
assertions: Agent simplifies the prompt and retries once
If second attempt also fails, request is moved to agents/web-designer/output/requests/failed/
Error report written to agents/image-designer/output/errors/
No partial WebP is written to website/
